title: 讓步副詞子句 although / even though / even if

formulas.formula: Although/Even though + S + V, S + V.
Even if + S + V, S + V.

explanation: 此句型用於表達「雖然…但是…」的讓步關係。Although 和 even though 表示陳述已知事實，在句首或句中都可使用；even if 表示假設情景，不關心真偽。三者都不可與 but 同用在同一個句子裡，because but 與讓步意義重複。Though 較口語，可置於句尾表示「不過、然而」。此句型強調前半部事實不影響後半部結論的成立。

examples.eng: Although she is very busy, she still makes time for her family.
examples.chi: 雖然她非常忙碌，她仍然抽出時間陪伴家人。

examples.eng: Even though it was raining heavily, the outdoor concert went on as planned.
examples.chi: 儘管下著大雨，戶外音樂會仍按計畫進行。

examples.eng: Even if you study hard, success is not guaranteed in this competitive field.
examples.chi: 即使你努力學習，在這個競爭領域中也不能保證成功。

examples.eng: Though expensive, this medicine is effective in treating the disease.
examples.chi: 儘管昂貴，這種藥物在治療該疾病方面很有效。

extension.tip: 區分 even though 和 even if：even though 陳述真實情況（已發生或確定），even if 表示假設（不管是否真實）。注意不可在讓步子句後用 but，應改用逗號或用 still/yet/however 在主句。句型公式中的兩個 S + V 各為獨立句子，須有主詞和動詞。

examples.test: Even though he won the lottery, he is not happy.
examples.result: → 正確。陳述事實（已經贏得彩票），用 even though。

examples.test: Even if he won the lottery, he would not be happy.
examples.result: → 正確。表假設（假如贏得），用 even if 搭配虛擬語氣。

examples.test: Although she studied hard, but she failed the exam.
examples.result: → 錯誤。不可同時用 although 和 but，應刪除 but 或改為逗號。

extension.note: even though 看已經發生，even if 看假如發生；兩者都禁止配 but，要改用逗號或轉折詞。

parts: she was tired, she insisted on finishing the project that day.
exercises.sentence: Although she was tired, she insisted on finishing the project that day.
exercises.translation: 雖然她很疲倦，她仍堅持在當天完成這個專案。

parts: Even if you have the best equipment,
exercises.sentence: Even if you have the best equipment, you cannot succeed without practice.
exercises.translation: 即使你有最好的設備，沒有練習你也無法成功。

exercises.sentence: The team lost the match, though they played exceptionally well.
exercises.translation: 隊伍雖然輸掉比賽，但他們表現得格外出色。

parts: it rained all day, the children enjoyed playing in the garden.
exercises.sentence: Even though it rained all day, the children enjoyed playing in the garden.
exercises.translation: 儘管整天下雨，孩子們還是喜歡在花園裡玩耍。

vocab_table.zh: 雖然（表陳述事實的讓步）
即使、儘管（表陳述事實的讓步）
儘管（介系詞片語，後接名詞）
仍然（常與讓步句型搭配）

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的讓步連接詞完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ she didn't have much experience, she performed very well in the interview.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (Although)。句子表達「雖然她缺乏經驗，但她在面試中表現很好」，這是陳述已知事實的讓步關係，應使用 although。B (even if) 表假設，不適合；C (because) 和 D (since) 表原因，與句意不符。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別讓步副詞子句中的連接詞選擇
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ you study hard, you still need good rest to perform well on the exam.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B (Although)。句子表達「雖然你努力學習，但仍需要充分休息才能在考試中表現好」，這陳述已知事實。A、B 皆可表陳述事實，但 B 更正式；C (even if) 表假設；D (however) 是副詞，不能引導子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 識別讓步副詞子句與假設情景的區分
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ it rains tomorrow, the sports day will not be cancelled. The event will proceed indoors if necessary.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C (even if)。後句說明運動會仍會進行，表示不關心「下雨」是否真實發生，這是假設情景，應用 even if。A、B 表陳述已知事實；D (unless) 表「除非」，不符讓步意義。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜讓步句型辨析與句法正確性判斷
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the project faced numerous obstacles and delays, the team's determination never wavered, and they eventually delivered results that exceeded expectations.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A (Even though)。句子敘述已發生的實際困境，強調這些困難未能動搖團隊決心，需用 even though 表陳述事實的讓步。B (even if) 表假設不適；C (although because) 混用讓步與因果會造成重複，文法錯誤；D (though) 較口語，通常置於句尾，句首較少用。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 雖然這部電影很長，但我還是很享受看它。
translation_exercises.answer: Although/Even though the movie is long, I still enjoyed watching it.
hints: 提示1：句型結構為『Although/Even though + S + V, S + V』，前半部說明已知事實
提示2：不可使用 but，因為讓步意義與 but 重複

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 儘管天氣很糟糕，我們的班級旅行仍然進行了。
translation_exercises.answer: Even though the weather was terrible, our class trip still went ahead.
key_points: Even though 表示已知事實
hints: 提示1：Even though 與 although 意義相近，都表示陳述事實，句型位置相同
提示2：注意時態一致性（過去式 was 搭配 went）

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 即使你考試失敗了，你的父母仍然會為你感到驕傲。
translation_exercises.answer: Even if you fail the exam, your parents will still be proud of you.
key_points: Even if 表示假設情景、非事實
條件句與主句的時態配合
hints: 提示1：Even if 用於假設狀況，不關心是否真實發生，與 although/even though 的差異在於『真偽性』
提示2：Even if 後常用現在式表示未來假設，主句用 will + V

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 雖然她沒有正式的工作經驗，但她的學習能力和熱情使她成為一個有價值的團隊成員。
translation_exercises.answer: Although/Even though she lacks formal work experience, her learning ability and enthusiasm make her a valuable team member.
key_points: 並列主語 ability and enthusiasm
hints: 提示1：句型框架『Although + S + V, S + V』，前後子句內容複雜時仍需清楚標示主述結構
提示2：注意主詞複數時動詞變化（make 而非 makes），並避免在讓步子句後誤加 but
